parameters.parameters/uri: _api/web/lists/getByTitle('PowerClaw_Config')/items?$filter=(SettingName eq 'KillSwitch' or SettingName eq 'IsRunning') and SettingValue eq 'true'

parameters.parameters/body: @string(setProperty(setProperty(json('{}'), 'EventType', 'HeartbeatSkipped'), 'Summary', '"Skipped due to active lock or kill switch"'))

parameters.parameters/uri: _api/web/lists/getByTitle('PowerClaw_Memory_Log')/items?$filter=Timestamp ge '@{addHours(utcNow(), -1)}' and (EventType eq 'ActionExecuted' or EventType eq 'ToolCalled' or EventType eq 'TaskCompleted')

thoughts.description: The agent's reasoning during the heartbeat.

mcpActionsTaken.description: List of MCP Graph queries executed (e.g., 'Checked Calendar', 'Sent Teams Message').

memoryUpdateSummary.description: A concise summary to be logged in the SharePoint Memory List.

parameters.parameters/uri: _api/web/lists/getByTitle('PowerClaw Memory')/items?$filter=ScopeKey eq '@{items('Apply_to_each:_Save_Memories')?['scopeKey']}' and (Status eq 'Active' or Status eq 'Tentative')&$orderby=Modified desc&$top=5

parameters.parameters/body: @string(setProperty(setProperty(setProperty(json('{}'), 'EventType', 'Error'), 'Summary', 'Agent call failed or returned output that could not be parsed as JSON. See FullContextJSON for raw output.'), 'FullContextJSON', coalesce(outputs('Execute_Agent_and_wait')?['body/lastResponse'], '(empty response)')))

parameters.parameters/uri: _api/web/lists/getByTitle('PowerClaw Memory')/items?$filter=Status ne 'Expired' and Status ne 'Superseded'&$orderby=Importance desc, LastConfirmedAt desc&$top=15

parameters.parameters/body: @string(setProperty(setProperty(setProperty(json('{}'), 'EventType', 'Error'), 'Summary', '"Heartbeat execution failed or timed out."'), 'FullContextJSON', string(result('Scope:_Execution'))))
